misc.title: I think the next arc will be the climax of the Pirate Saga, built up by the "Man with the Burned Scar"which will lead to the Four Emperors event, where they will clash against one another in a battle
misc.text: I think the next arc will be the climax of the Pirate Saga, built up by the "Man with the Burned Scar"which will lead to the Four Emperors event, where they will clash against one another in a battle royale. The next arc is going to be the absolute peak of the entire pirate era!

misc.title: For me, the question is when and where within the storyline, this fight will be placed (because it *has* to happen)? Theoretically, it would make sense for it to occur during the race for the title of
misc.text: For me, the question is when and where within the storyline, this fight will be placed (because it *has* to happen)? Theoretically, it would make sense for it to occur during the race for the title of Pirate King. When do you guys think Zoro vs. Mihawk will take place? Geo (@Geo_AW) this gonna be zoro when he finally beat mihawk — https://nitter.net/Geo_AW/status/2062398603331518669#m

misc.title: The best way of Code to redeem himself is by killing off people close to Boruto. Ikemoto needs to hold his balls in his hands and start to write the story with a darker and more emotional tone - Code
misc.text: The best way of Code to redeem himself is by killing off people close to Boruto. Ikemoto needs to hold his balls in his hands and start to write the story with a darker and more emotional tone - Code would be the perfect guy for this… #BORUTO Anime Explained (@NarutoExplained) Code is either going to have the biggest comeback of all time or he’s gonna be taken out like trash the moment someone gets tired of his shit. No in between #boruto #BorutoTwoBlueVortexCh15 — https://nitter.net/NarutoExplained/status/1848037117999383025#m
